query_normalized: dreamx-world 1.0: a general-purpose interactive world model computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) as a foundational methodology and (a) as same-mechanism evidence, since it provides a canonical, reproducible implementation and empirical study of the core "world model" mechanism (future video prediction, action-conditioning, and autoregressive rollout) that the user's question targets, even though it focuses on a minimalist scale rather than a "general-purpose" system.
